title: Hostile Investor Q&A
description: When the investor is looking for a weakness, what survives scrutiny.
summary_pt_br: Q&A hostil: reconheça a premissa, separe em partes, responda a pior primeiro, ofereça dados, sem emoção.

scenes.subtitle_en: When the investor is looking for a weakness, what survives scrutiny.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Q&A hostil: reconheça a premissa, separe em partes, responda a pior primeiro, ofereça dados, sem emoção.

scenes.text_en: When the investor is looking for a weakness, what survives scrutiny. Focus: hostile investor q&a. That's a fair question — let me separate it into three parts.
scenes.text_pt: Q&A hostil: reconheça a premissa, separe em partes, responda a pior primeiro, ofereça dados, sem emoção. Foco: hostile investor q&a. Pergunta justa — vou separar em três partes.

scenes.title: Hostile Investor Q&A
scenes.body_en: Hostile Q&A moves: ACKNOWLEDGE the premise. SEPARATE the question into parts. ANSWER the hardest part first. OFFER to follow up with data. Never defend emotionally.
scenes.body_pt: Q&A hostil: reconheça a premissa, separe em partes, responda a pior primeiro, ofereça dados, sem emoção.

examples.en: That's a fair question — let me separate it into three parts.
examples.pt: Pergunta justa — vou separar em três partes.

examples.en: The hardest part is the cash-flow one, and I'll answer that first.
examples.pt: A parte mais difícil é a de fluxo de caixa — respondo primeiro.

examples.en: I can send you the detailed model by Friday.
examples.pt: Envio o modelo detalhado até sexta.

exercise.question: Complete: "That's a fair ___ — let me separate it into three parts."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "That's a fair question — let me separate it into three parts."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Pergunta justa — vou separar em três partes.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
The hardest part is the cash-flow one, and I'll answer that first.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "The hardest part is the cash-flow one, and I'll answer that first."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A parte mais difícil é a de fluxo de caixa — respondo primeiro.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Hostile Investor Q&A — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre hostile investor q&a. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca — hostile question: 'Your numbers don't add up.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Fair. Let me separate that into three parts.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Still hostile: 'I don't trust the growth claim.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I can send you our cohort data by Friday.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you — you're right. Here's the number.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: They push harder: 'You're one bad quarter from dying.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We have fourteen months of runway. Not one quarter.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I welcome rigor. Please keep pushing.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Composure under fire is the quietest form of power.

scenes.title: The Q&A after the pitch
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four composure moves under hostile scrutiny. Use at least three business terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: After the pitch, an investor opened with what he clearly believed was the killing question of the afternoon.

paragraphs.speaker: Investor
paragraphs.en: I don't trust your growth number. Your cohort data from Q3 contradicts the claim you just made on slide four.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: That's a fair question — let me separate it into three parts and answer the hardest one first clearly.

paragraphs.speaker: Investor
paragraphs.en: Good. Don't dodge the margin question — I've heard three founders do that today already, and the answers got worse each time.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Thank you — you're right, I was about to. Here's the number. I can send the detailed model by Friday.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Composure under hostile scrutiny, Joca had learned, is the quietest and most underrated form of power in any pitch.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Hostile Investor Q&A". When the investor is looking for a weakness, what survives scrutiny. That's a fair question — let me separate it into three parts. The hardest part is the cash-flow one, and I'll answer that first. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Hostile Investor Q&A". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Hostile Investor Q&A".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Hostile Investor Q&A".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
